text:
Japan is a nation in Asia and is the primary setting of Neon Genesis Evangelion and Rebuild of Evangelion.

Before 2015

In 2000, Japan had a population of several million people and was a well-developed nation; then the Second Impact occured and this led to social unrest and war. Later on Tokyo is destroyed with an N² bomb and is replaced by Tokyo-2 then Tokyo-3. During this time the Evangelions were under construction by Gehirn (Later NERV), plus the United Nations is moved to Tokyo-3.

During 2015

The year when the Angels start attacking. During several battles with the Angels many parts of Tokyo are destroyed and during the The End of Evangelion, Tokyo-3 is destroyed by an Anti A.T. Field set off by the Mass Production Evangelions.

Government

The government of Japan is similar to its real life counterpart. Their government has its Prime Minister and the Diet (Japanese congress); however a lot of what the government does is controlled by the United Nations (which SEELE has major political and financial control of).

Military

Japan's military is the Japanese Strategic Self Defense Force which is under control of the United Nations and Japanese government (In truth the secret organization SEELE controls them).

Notable Events

Invasion of NERV HQ by JSSDF to "prevent" the Third Impact - During The End of Evangelion
"Impacts"
Third Impact - During the The End of Evangelion
Tokyo-3 destroyed by Anti A.T. Field set off by Mass Production Evangelions - During The End of Evangelion
Near Third Impact - During the Rebuild of Evangelion movie Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
Fourth Impact - During the Rebuild of Evangelion movie Evangelion 3.0: You Can (Not) Redo
